args: import pathlib, runpy, sys; root = pathlib.Path.home() / '.codex' / 'plugins' / 'cache' / 'codex-loop-plugin' / 'codex-loop'; versions = [p for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_dir()]; script = max(versions, key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime) / 'scripts' / 'codex-loop-mcp'; sys.path.insert(0, str(script.parent)); runpy.run_path(str(script), run_name='__main__')
